name: TOWA Corporation
summary: TOWA Corporation designs, develops, manufactures, and sells semiconductor manufacturing equipment and high-precision molds in Japan and internationally. Its products include molding equipment, singulation equipment, ultra-precision molds, THPL-CBN end mills, and TEN-systems; and laser processing equipment, as well as fine plastic molded products. The company also offers manufacturing systems for electronic components, precision-molded and assembly products, medical-use equipment, electronic-communications equipment; and remodeling/repairing, and contract processing services. In addition, it sells used equipment. The company was formerly known as TOWA Precision Industries Limited and changed its name to TOWA Corporation in December 1988. TOWA Corporation was founded in 1979 and is headquartered in Kyoto, Japan.
